overview: Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology Delhi (IIIT Delhi / IIITD), located in Okhla Industrial Estate Phase III, New Delhi, is a premier autonomous state university established in 2008 by an Act of the Delhi Legislature. The institute is widely recognized for its advanced research ecosystem, globally reputed faculty, cutting-edge computer science programs, and strong industry collaboration in deep tech, artificial intelligence, data science, and innovation-driven engineering education.
accreditation: Autonomous State University established by the Government of Delhi; recognized under UGC and known for strong research-oriented engineering education.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹4,50,000 – ₹4,75,000 per academic year depending on semester progression and fee structure revisions.
Generally offset through institute-funded research fellowships and stipends.

placements.totalOffers: 769 total offers including 559 domestic full-time offers and 210 internships (2025 season)
placements.companiesVisited: 207 recruiters participated in the 2025 placement cycle

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are conducted through JAC Delhi counseling based on JEE Main ranks. M.Tech admissions are generally based on GATE scores and institute-level processes.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow the JAC Delhi and institute academic admission calendar every year.

hostelAndMess.hostelFee: ₹60,000 – ₹90,000 per annum depending on occupancy type and accommodation configuration.

scholarships.name: Delhi Government Fee Waiver Scheme
scholarships.details: Provides 100%, 50%, or 25% tuition fee waivers for economically weaker students based on annual family income.

scholarships.name: Chairman’s Merit Scholarship
scholarships.details: Merit-based financial awards for top-performing JEE Main entrants.

scholarships.name: M.Tech GATE Fellowship
scholarships.details: Eligible GATE-qualified M.Tech students receive approximately ₹12,400 per month stipend support.

campus.location: Okhla Industrial Estate, Phase III, New Delhi
campus.specialNote: IIIT Delhi is particularly known for specialized interdisciplinary computer science programs, strong startup culture, international collaborations, and advanced AI/data-driven research initiatives.

contact.address: Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology Delhi, Okhla Industrial Estate, Phase III, New Delhi – 110020, India
